name: source-folder closed-loop step doctor-index regeneration accurately reflects the new file in INDEX.md
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google generated-code-quality-standards/_meta && printf 'source:
  id: google-new
  authoritative_publisher: google
  authoritative_url: x
  registry_link: x
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:abc
rules:
  - id: g-google-new-1
    detector: x
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/google-new.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step doctor-index --root generated-code-quality-standards --index generated-code-quality-standards/_meta/INDEX.md 2>err.txt && grep -q 'google-new.yaml' generated-code-quality-standards/_meta/INDEX.md && echo ok 1>&2
